premise_set: P := p_a + Axioms 1-5 + Assumption 6 + emitted OPH nodes D1-D10 + current public D12 quark objects
theorem_statement: On the present premise set P, the corpus theorem-emits the maximal quark package recorded in oph_quark_maximal_theorem_emitted_package, but it does not emit the stronger physical closure objects Theta_ud^mass, Theta_ud^phys, or Theta_ud^abs.

theorem_emitted_package_summary.mass_side: Theorem-emitted D12 mass ray R_D12^ud with unresolved modulus ray_modulus = t1.
theorem_emitted_package_summary.selector: Theorem-emitted same-label left-handed selector sigma_ud = sigma_ref with canonical token D12::same_label_left::reference_sheet.
theorem_emitted_package_summary.affine_mean_package: Theorem-emitted restricted-scope affine mean package with g_ch = 0.9231656602589082 on shared_budget_only and (g_u, g_d) = (0.7797392875757557, 0.12172551081512113) on current_family_only.

non_derivable_objects.reason: P emits the D12 one-parameter mass ray but not a theorem-grade nonzero modulus t1.
P emits the negative selector closure sigma_ref and no sector-attached same-label left-handed lift from sigma_ref to the physical CKM shell.
P carries the affine mean split only on a target-anchored current_family_only witness and does not emit target-free physical-sheet scales (g_u, g_d).
